TWELVE JURORS AND ONE ALTERNATE ARE SWORN. COURT PRE-INSTRUCTS JURY, ADMONISHES JURY AND RECESSES TO 9:30 FEB 16, 2000.

TRIAL RESUMES IN DEPT 414, COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL ADDRESS COURT AND JURY WITH OPENING STATEMENTS. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. COURT ADMONISHES JURY AND RECESSES UNTIL 9:30 FEB 17, 2000.
TRIAL RESUMES, COURT, COUNSEL AND JURORS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REST. JURY ADMONISHED AND COURT RECESSED UNTIL 9:30 FEB 18, 2000.

TRIAL RESUMES, COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT. JURY INSTRUCTED. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL PRESENT OPENING AND CLOSING ARGUMENT. AT 11:40 JURY RETIRES IN CUSTODY OF SWORN BAILIFF TO DELIBERATE. AT 3:15 THE JURY RETURNS IT'S VERDICT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS ROSE WONG, $1,000 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND $1,000 NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES, 50 % CONTRIBUTARY NEGLIGENCE; JESSICA WONG, $100 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND ZERO NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES; VICTORIA WONG $100 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND ZERO NON- ECONOMIC DAMAGES; KIMBERLY WONG $100 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND ZERO NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND CLARISSA WONG $100 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND ZERO NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES, ALL AGAINST DEFENDANT ALBERT G. CASTANEDA. JURY POLLED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL. COURT ADMOURNS.
JURY INSTRUCTIONS SPECIAL VERDICT
